acmpca.certificate.extendedkeyusage.CfnA: Specifies additional purposes for which the certified public key may be used other than basic purposes indicated in the `KeyUsage` extension.

acmpca.certificate.extendedkeyusage.Exte.Description: Specifies a custom `ExtendedKeyUsage` with an object identifier (OID).
Specifies a standard `ExtendedKeyUsage` as defined as in [RFC 5280](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc5280#section-4.2.1.12).
acmpca.certificate.extendedkeyusage.Exte.Allowed values: CERTIFICATE_TRANSPARENCY | CLIENT_AUTH | CODE_SIGNING | DOCUMENT_SIGNING | EMAIL_PROTECTION | OCSP_SIGNING | SERVER_AUTH | SMART_CARD_LOGIN | TIME_STAMPING
